skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies.
skill1.note: Literal trigger per kit text; fires on every team FB regardless of who bursted.

skill1.kitLine: Effects vary according to the number of times entered. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it:
skill1.note: Escalating kind implements the cumulative-step semantics; engine applies steps 1..N on Nth activation (sim.ts:1172).

skill1.kitLine: Once: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 2.34 sec.
Twice: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 2.7 sec.
Three times: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼ 3.17 sec.
skill1.note: From 3rd FB onward every FB-enter grants full 2.34+2.7+3.17=8.21s CDR.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects all allies.
skill1.note: Literal trigger; fires ONLY on rotations Liter herself bursts, not another B1's cast.

skill1.kitLine: Effects vary according to the number of times used. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it:
skill1.note: Same escalating semantics as block A; ramps to all three buffs by her 3rd burst cast.

skill1.kitLine: Once: Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 45.17% for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Weapon-state modifier (team ammo ▲ = more shots before reload); not skippable as defensive per note.

skill2.kitLine: Affects 2 ally unit(s) with the lowest remaining cover HP.
skill2.note: Two documented approximations (⚑2): (a) trigger fullBurstEnter is INVENTED — kit text gives no trigger; (b) schema has no lowest-cover-HP target kind, approximated to all allies (real effect hits 2 units; recovery-consumer procs may over-fire ~2.5×).

Heal event with no magnitude by design (v1 models no HP pools). Whether a cover-HP restore emits an HP-recovery event in game is UNMEASURED (⚑2c); if a Liter+consumer recording shows no proc, demote to unmodeled.

burst.note: 5s on ~20s B1 cycle → low uptime is kit-faithful, not a modeling gap.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: cadence tuple (SMG datamined rate of fire, reloadFrames 111) is the unverified datamine — read rounds/min + reload gap from any focus video (⚑1)
documentedConfounds.why: Liter's own SMG damage is minor (support unit); 120 ammo at SMG class rate is a plausible multi-second magazine with no special fire-mode flavor. Cadence error barely moves her contribution; team buffs are the real value and are unaffected.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: cover-HP restore modeled as recovery event to ALL allies on Full Burst enter — trigger invented, real target is 2 lowest-cover-HP allies, cover-repair recovery-emission unmeasured (⚑2)
documentedConfounds.why: Heal event carries no magnitude and v1 models no HP pools, so non-consumer teams are entirely unaffected. Only a recovery-consumer teammate (e.g. Crown 'when recovery takes effect') could key off it, and even then the over-fire is ~2.5× on a zero-magnitude event — no damage-number impact in a self-sim.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: team buffs are short (5 sec) by kit text — low uptime on a ~20 sec cycle is faithful, not a modeling gap
documentedConfounds.why: Explicitly ruled as kit-faithful by the author; the 5s duration is taken verbatim from kit text. Not a gap.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑3 blast radius: team burstCdr accelerates the WHOLE team's rotation and can add full bursts board-wide — reviewer must run /sim-battery diff before any board-level claim
documentedConfounds.why: This is a validation-methodology note (how to check the model), not a modeling gap. The CDR values [2.34, 2.7, 3.17] are taken directly from kit text; the escalating semantics match the literal 'each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it'.

authorIntentSummary: Parser-baseline HYPOTHESIS (not yet validated/measured). The author modeled Liter as the canonical B1 CDR/enabler: S1 block A gives escalating team burst-CDR [2.34/2.7/3.17]s on every fullBurstEnter, S1 block B gives escalating team buffs [maxAmmo 45.17% / critDmg 12.46% / ATK 14.42%] on Liter's own burstCast, and burst gives team ATK 66% for 5s. S2 cover-HP restore is modeled as a zero-magnitude heal event with an invented fullBurstEnter trigger and all-allies targeting (both ⚑2 approximations). All kit lines are represented by blocks; unmodeled arrays are empty. Key not-yet-faithful spots: S2 trigger/target/recovery-emission are unmeasured (⚑2), SMG cadence is unverified datamine (⚑1), and the whole override carries a PARSER BASELINE banner pending hand-tune + real-fight recording.
